factors.rationale: The product is the single dominant focal point and fills enough of the frame to identify instantly.
The accessory is shown in a realistic context, suggesting its use and functionality.
The image clearly communicates a specific benefit related to drop protection.
The layout is clear, with a readable text and no distracting elements.
The image showcases texture and construction details effectively.
The image includes a credible trust signal related to military drop standards.
The image has strong contrast and sharp subject boundaries, making it easily readable.
